corrections.current:
23 ἐποίει δὲ τὸν διωγμὸν εὐτονώτε-
ρον Ἰούδας, συνεκτίνων
corrections.correct:
23 ἐποίει δὲ τὸν διωγμὸν εὐτονώτε-
ρον Ἰούδας, συνετίνων
corrections.note: Printed text reads συνετίνων, not συνεκτίνων.

uncertain.note: The apparatus reading after γοητιας appears to be γοηγματιας/γοηματιας in V*; image is not fully clear enough to correct confidently from the supplied scan.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct, but verse numbers 23, 24, 28, 29, 30 are duplicated from marginal line numbers in the transcription. Apparatus has at least one clear omission of a siglum marker and one likely misread word, but only confident corrections should be applied.
